demo.title: megapot-tickets.sh
demo.code:
# Check the live jackpot
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill to check the jackpot"

# Buy 2 quick-pick (random) tickets
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill to buy 2 megapot tickets"

# Buy a custom-number ticket (validated against live ball ranges)
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill to buy a ticket with numbers 4 8 15 16 23 + 7"

# Gift a ticket to any wallet, ENS, or X handle
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill to buy a megapot ticket for @friend"

# Subscribe: one ticket every day
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill to buy me a megapot ticket every day"

# Did I win? Discover and claim
bankr prompt "use the megapot-tickets skill — did I win? claim it if so"

setup: Requires the [bankr skill](https://github.com/BankrBot/skills/tree/main/bankr) for wallet signing and submission on Base (chain ID `8453`)
Fund the wallet with USDC for tickets ($1 each) plus a small amount of ETH for gas
Contract addresses and ABIs are verified live against https://llms.megapot.io
